put.description: Marks a single notification as read
Marks all unread notifications for a user as read

post.description: Syncs a newly registered Clerk user into the local database
Records a new financial transaction. Automatically updates the associated account's balance.
Registers a new subscription for tracking recurring payments
Creates a new recurring transaction schedule
Registers a new payment method for a user
Creates a savings goal, optionally linked to an account
Creates a new category. If userId is omitted, it becomes a system category.
Creates a budget with allocated items per category
Creates a new financial account for a specific user

delete.description: Soft deletes a user by setting status to DEACTIVATED
Soft deletes a transaction by setting status to VOIDED and reversing the balance

get.description: Retrieves a specific subscription by its ID

delete.description: Cancels and soft deletes a subscription

patch.description: Pauses an active subscription or resumes a paused one

delete.description: Soft deletes by setting status to CANCELLED

patch.description: Partially updates a recurring transaction rule
Toggles a recurring transaction between ACTIVE and PAUSED

get.description: Retrieves a specific payment method by its ID
Retrieves a goal, resolving current amount from linked account if applicable

delete.description: Soft deletes a goal by setting status to CANCELLED

patch.description: Adds a manual contribution to a non-linked goal

delete.description: Soft deletes a category by setting status to INACTIVE

get.description: Retrieves a budget with its items

delete.description: Soft deletes a budget by archiving it

get.description: Retrieves a specific account by its ID

delete.description: Soft deletes an account by setting status to CLOSED

get.description: Retrieves a local user profile using their external Clerk ID
Retrieves the paginated ledger history for a specific account, newest first
Retrieves paginated subscriptions belonging to a specific user

get.summary: Get recurring transactions for a user
List connected banks for a user
Get payment methods for a user
get.description: Retrieves paginated payment methods belonging to a specific user
Returns paginated notifications for a user, newest first
Returns the number of unread notifications for a user
Returns paginated goals for a user

get.summary: Get latest portfolio snapshot for a user

get.description: Retrieves all custom categories created by a specific user
Retrieves all default system categories available to all users
Returns paginated budgets for a user

get.summary: Get audit logs for a specific user
Get audit logs for a specific entity
Get all accounts for a user
get.description: Retrieves all accounts belonging to a specific user
